ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "asin" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the product (ASIN) */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "rating_count" INTEGER /* Total number of ratings for the product */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the product */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Available quantity of the product */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date when the product was added to the platform */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the product information was last updated */,
  "is_featured" INTEGER /* Indicates if the product is featured */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the product image */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of tags for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("asin"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category FOREIGN KEY ("category") REFERENCES product_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_brand FOREIGN KEY ("brand") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "asin" TEXT /* ASIN of the product being reviewed */,
  "reviewer_id" TEXT /* ID of the reviewer */,
  "overall_rating" INTEGER /* Overall rating given by the reviewer (1-5) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was posted */,
  "sentiment_analysis_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sentiment analysis result for the review */,
  "new_score" REAL /* New score derived from the sentiment analysis */,
  "review_title" TEXT /* Title of the review */,
  "review_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the review */,
  "is_recommended" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the reviewer recommends the product */,
  "is_verified_purchase" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the review is from a verified purchase */,
  "helpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of helpful votes the review has received */,
  "unhelpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of unhelpful votes the review has received */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the review has been deleted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_asin FOREIGN KEY ("asin") REFERENCES products ("asin"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_sentiment_analysis_id FOREIGN KEY ("sentiment_analysis_id") REFERENCES sentiment_analysis ("sentiment_analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES reviewers ("reviewer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviewers" (
  "reviewer_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each reviewer */,
  "reviewer_name" TEXT /* Name of the reviewer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the reviewer */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the reviewer registered on the platform */,
  "review_count" INTEGER /* Total number of reviews posted by the reviewer */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating given by the reviewer */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the reviewer's profile picture */,
  "verified_status" TEXT /* Verification status of the reviewer */,
  "is_banned" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the reviewer is banned */,
  "last_active" TEXT /* The date when the reviewer was last active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reviewer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sentiment_analysis" (
  "sentiment_analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sentiment analysis result */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review being analyzed */,
  "negative_score" REAL /* Score of negative sentiment (0-1) */,
  "neutral_score" REAL /* Score of neutral sentiment (0-1) */,
  "positive_score" REAL /* Score of positive sentiment (0-1) */,
  "compound_score" REAL /* Compound score of the sentiment (ranges from -1 to 1) */,
  "sentiment_label" TEXT /* Label of the sentiment (e.g., 'positive', 'negative', 'neutral') */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the sentiment analysis */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the sentiment analysis was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sentiment_analysis_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_categories" (
  "category_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the brand */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "review_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "review_tag_map" (
  "map_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag mapping */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("map_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_tag_map_tag_id FOREIGN KEY ("tag_id") REFERENCES review_tags ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_tag_map_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "review_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each detailed rating */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review */,
  "aspect" TEXT /* Aspect being rated (e.g., content, delivery, value) */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating for the aspect */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_ratings_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "review_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review being commented on */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user who posted the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was posted */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the comment has been deleted */,
  "is_reported" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the comment has been reported */,
  "report_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the comment has been reported */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_comments_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered on the platform */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., customer, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_profiles" (
  "user_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biographical information */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "interests" TEXT /* Interests of the user */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website or blog of the user */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of social media links */,
  "bio_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the bio was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_map" (
  "map_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role mapping */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" TEXT /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("map_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_map_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_map_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity log */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., login, review, purchase) */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date the activity occurred */,
  "activity_details" TEXT /* Details of the activity */,
  "activity_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the activity was performed */,
  "activity_device" TEXT /* Device used to perform the activity (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_reviews" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "asin" TEXT /* ASIN of the product */,
  "total_reviews" INTEGER /* Total number of reviews for the product */,
  "positive_reviews" INTEGER /* Number of positive reviews */,
  "negative_reviews" INTEGER /* Number of negative reviews */,
  "neutral_reviews" INTEGER /* Number of neutral reviews */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the product */,
  "total_helpful_votes" INTEGER /* Total number of helpful votes for all reviews of the product */,
  "total_unhelpful_votes" INTEGER /* Total number of unhelpful votes for all reviews of the product */,
  "total_recommended" INTEGER /* Total number of reviews that recommend the product */,
  "total_verified_reviews" INTEGER /* Total number of verified reviews for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "asin" TEXT /* ASIN of the product being commented on */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user who posted the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was posted */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the comment has been deleted */,
  "is_reported" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the comment has been reported */,
  "report_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the comment has been reported */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_comments_asin FOREIGN KEY ("asin") REFERENCES products ("asin"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
